Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x800C "STALAGI-800C" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stalag I.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
NOP'd out the BNE $8116 instruction at $8119 to remove a copy protection mechanism which tests if the game was loaded from tape. It does this by checking the bytes at $0341 and $0343 match what's expected (these are chars within the last file read from tape). If the check fails, the game never starts.
Note: although the true start address is $8000, we use $800C to skip a test against $BA to check if the game was loaded from tape - if this fails, the kernal reset routine is called.
